name: Baga Beach
description: One of the most popular beaches in Goa, famous for its nightlife, water sports, and seafood shacks.

name: Fort Aguada
description: A well-preserved seventeenth-century Portuguese fort standing on Sinquerim Beach, overlooking the Arabian Sea.

name: Amber Fort
description: A majestic fort known for its artistic Hindu style elements and breathtaking views of Maota Lake.

name: Hawa Mahal
description: The 'Palace of Winds' features 953 small windows designed to keep the palace cool for the royal ladies.

name: Alleppey Backwaters
description: Experience the serene beauty of the Venice of the East on a traditional houseboat.

name: Munnar Tea Gardens
description: Lush green tea plantations spread across hills, offering a tranquil and refreshing experience.

name: Red Fort
description: A historic fort in the city of Delhi that served as the main residence of the Mughal Emperors.

name: Qutub Minar
description: A 73-metre tall tapering tower of five storeys, and a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

name: Taj Mahal
description: An ivory-white marble mausoleum on the southern bank of the river Yamuna, one of the Seven Wonders of the World.

name: Agra Fort
description: A historical fort which was the main residence of the emperors of the Mughal Dynasty until 1638.

name: Dashashwamedh Ghat
description: The main ghat in Varanasi on the Ganga River, famous for its daily evening Ganga Aarti ceremony.

name: Kashi Vishwanath Temple
description: One of the most famous Hindu temples dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in the heart of the holy city.
